landing_card.title: Skaraborg
landing_card.subtitle: Planned catalog-driven region
landing_card.description: Forward-design slot proving that new regions need catalogs plus validated runtime data, not hardcoded app branches.

readiness_requirements: Define reviewed region boundary and CRS.
Create display geometry package and expected H3 counts.
Add landscape, potential, scenario and acceptance manifests or mark them explicitly unavailable.
Import validated runtime data or document file fallbacks.
runtime_note: Skaraborg is intentionally represented as planned/disabled until reviewed source data and runtime contracts exist.
